headline: RTX Poland Expansion Adds Capacity And Feeds Ongoing Growth Story
summary: Collins Aerospace, part of NYSE:RTX, has finished a major expansion of its landing gear manufacturing facility in Poland. The enlarged site increases landing gear production capacity by nearly 25% for both defense and commercial aviation programs. The project is set to create almost 200 new jobs and deepen RTX’s role in the European aerospace supply chain. RTX, trading at $174.41, is involved in several long running trends in global aerospace and defense, with this Poland expansion adding...

headline: The Only Public Space Stock Even Elon Musk Can’t Dismiss
summary: Here’s the uncomfortable truth for anyone who wants exposure to the space economy: the company that dominates it isn’t public. SpaceX prints launches, prints Starlink revenue, and prints headlines. You can’t buy it. So when SpaceX itself bothers to name the rivals it actually watches, that list matters. headline: RTX's Collins Aerospace opens expanded manufacturing facility in Tajęcina, Poland
summary: Collins Aerospace, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, has opened its newly expanded, 22,000 square-meter manufacturing facility in Tajęcina, Poland. The $69 million expansion will support an increase in landing gear system production capacity by nearly 25% for both commercial and defense aircraft programs. The site will create approximately 190 new jobs this year.
